title: Trump administration asks OpenAI to stagger release of new model
abstract: Boost your productivity with stealth! **Trump admin asks OpenAI to stagger release—missed calls skyrocket!**
abstract_zh: 伙计们，Trump都开始催OpenAI了，你们还在等啥？快来试试 **Trump administration asks OpenAI to stagger release of new model** 吧！这可是个效率提升神器，在写周报时帮你自动填充数据，调Bug时给你提供精确代码参考。简直是加班狗的福音！
